details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest 3-day meditation retreat next month (private room, vegetarian)
Task 2: Enroll in highest-rated beginner course under $300 (next 14 days, live Q&A)
Task 3: Book 60-minute 1:1 mentoring with most experienced mentor under $120, next Friday 4-7pm
Task 4: Customize 5-day retreat with three workshops (<$50, includes Sound Healing)
Task 5: Add three shop items (price- and rating-filtered) and review cart
Task 6: Register for free weekday evening community event this month (>20 spots left)
Task 7: Create 3-item "Bedtime Practice" playlist with sleep audios (10-20 min, rating >= 4.5)
Task 8: Search FAQ for "wheelchair" then send accessibility & dairy-free contact message
